files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for the Guide Lessons department. Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content. The file also contains additional content after the lessons including a Teacher's Topic, poem, advertisements, and other magazine content that should remain with the Guide Lessons section as supporting material.
